Command.Name: Speech Engine Fix
Command.Title: Troubleshooting Microsoft Speech Engine.
Command.Description:
If you're having trouble with Grammar Police or another modification that requires Microsoft Speech Engine, please review the setup instructions carefully. The following video may help guide you through the process:
1 https://youtu.be/3o7LKaRmTv0 
2 **Before requesting support, please verify the following:** 
3 - You have installed the 64-bit version of Microsoft Speech Platform Runtime. The 32-bit version is not compatible and will not work: https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/download/details.aspx?id=27225 
4 - You have installed a valid Speech Recognition (SR) language package. Installing only the Text-to-Speech (TTS) package will not work: 
5 https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/download/details.aspx?id=27224 
6 - The language you are attempting to use includes the required grammar and language files. **Languages that do not have compatible grammar files will not function correctly.**)).

Field.Name: Are you still having trouble?
Field.Value: If you have confirmed all of the above and are still experiencing issues, provide details about your setup and any error messages you receive.
